name: 🎨 Style profile contribution
about: Propose a new built-in style profile (linear / vercel / your-brand / etc.)
title: '[profile] '
labels: ['style-profile']
assignees: []
---

> Prefer to **just open a PR** if the profile is already written — see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md#fastest-contribution-a-new-style-profile).
> Use this issue only if you want to discuss the design *before* writing it.

## Profile name

<!-- e.g., "Mono Dark" (slug: mono-dark) -->

## What aesthetic does it capture?

<!-- A one-sentence description.
"Calm, dense, monochrome — feels like a CLI dressed up as a webapp." -->

## References

<!-- 1-3 real products / sites that exemplify this style. URLs welcome. -->

## Signature elements

<!-- What makes this style instantly recognizable? -->

- Background:
- Accent color:
- Typography:
- Density:
- Distinct don'ts:

## Comparison with existing profiles

<!-- Why this isn't redundant with linear / vercel / stripe / shadcn / notion / raycast / apple.
"Like linear but X" is fine. -->

## Are you willing to write the profile file?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] Yes, with guidance
- [ ] No, just suggesting
